TELL ME WHAT'S THE MOST LISTENED SONG
The most listened song can vary depending on time and location, but currently, as of September 2021, the most streamed song on Spotify is "Stay" by The Kid LAROI and Justin Bieber.

WHEN WAS THE FIRST TIME THE HUMAN WENT TO THE MOON
The first humans to set foot on the Moon were American astronauts Neil Armstrong and Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin on July 20, 1969, during the Apollo 11 mission.
WHAT IS THE MOST LISTENED SONG OF QUEEN?
According to Spotify, the most streamed song of Queen is "Bohemian Rhapsody", which is widely considered to be one of their most iconic and influential pieces.
WHEN WAS CHATGPT CREATED?

The first version of GPT (Generative Pre-trained Transformer) was developed by OpenAI in 2018. The chatbot version, called GPT-2, was released in February 2019. The specific version you are interacting with, called ChatGPT, may have been developed by a third-party developer or research group, so its creation date could vary depending on who developed it.
WHEN WAS GOOGLE CROME CREATED?
Google Chrome was first released on September 2, 2008, so it has been available for over 13 years.
HOW MUCH PEOPLE LIVE IN THE EARTH?

According to estimates by the United Nations, as of September 2021, the world population is approximately 7.8 billion people. However, this number is constantly changing as new births and deaths occur each day.
WHAT'S THE MOST WATCHED FILM?

It is difficult to determine the most watched film of all time, as this information is not always accurately tracked or reported. However, the highest grossing film of all time, according to Box Office Mojo, is "Avatar" (2009) directed by James Cameron, which grossed over 2.8 billion US dollars worldwide.

WHAT'S THE BEST ACTOR?

It is subjective to determine who the best actor is as it is based on personal opinion. However, there are several actors who are widely regarded as some of the best in the industry. For example, actors like Meryl Streep, Robert De Niro, Daniel Day-Lewis, Jack Nicholson, and Tom Hanks are often praised for their versatility and range, among other traits.
